title: workflows.schema-v1
description: Meta-schema for src/data/generated/workflows.schema-v1.json — the forge workflow-manifest export contract (FW-16). This manifest is identity/metadata only, one entry per workflow, in rendering order. FW-21's renderer derives its page set from this array (manifest-driven, not hand-listed) and pulls each workflow's field-level structure from the accompanying workflow JSON Schema file via schema_ref — that JSON Schema file is standard jsonschema2md input and is not itself modeled here.

schema_version.description: Contract version. New fields are additive/backward-compatible; removed or renamed fields require a new schema_version and a forge-site renderer update before merge.

forge_sha.description: forge commit SHA the export was generated from.

workflows.description: Flat list of every workflow manifest entry, in rendering order.

workflow.description: A hidden workflow only needs id/name/path/hidden populated. A non-hidden workflow must carry every field below (build fails otherwise), matching the CLI command node's hidden-exemption shape for consistency.

id.description: Stable identifier used as the URL slug. Renaming this without a schema_version bump is a breaking change.

path.description: Workflow file path or fully-qualified workflow name.

category.description: Grouping label used to cluster workflows in rendered docs navigation.

schema_ref.description: Pointer into the accompanying workflow JSON Schema file (e.g. a JSON Pointer like '#/definitions/deploy-workflow') identifying this workflow's field-level schema, for FW-21's jsonschema2md renderer.

hidden.description: Hidden workflows are excluded from rendered docs.

deprecated.description: false/absent-equivalent when not deprecated; a string carries the deprecation message rendered as a callout.
